title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers video explaining containerization and container orchestration using Amazon ECS. Covers the problem containers solve, Docker basics, ECS as an orchestrator, Fargate vs EC2 deployment options, and practical example with auto-scaling.
writeup: This AWS Developers video walks through containerization and orchestration on Amazon ECS, starting with the problem containers solve and the basics of Docker. It positions ECS as an orchestrator and compares the two deployment models, Fargate and EC2. The practical example closes with auto-scaling, tying the container concepts to how ECS runs and scales workloads in production.
